description_long: This rifle features a robust, angular design with a dark metallic receiver and barrel, complemented by deep reddish-brown wooden furniture on the stock, handguard, and pistol grip. The magazine is curved and metallic, typical of assault rifles, and the overall silhouette is reminiscent of the iconic AK-pattern rifles. The front sight post and rear sight are both visible, indicating iron sight aiming capability. The stock is fixed and solid, providing stability for firing, while the handguard and grip are ergonomically shaped for secure handling. The muzzle end appears to have a simple, open design without any advanced muzzle device attached.
description: A dark metal and reddish-brown wood rifle with a fixed stock, curved magazine, and iron sights, resembling an AK-pattern weapon. The design is robust and utilitarian, with visible ergonomic features.
description_view_0: Side profile showing the full length, fixed wooden stock, and the prominent curved magazine.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the top of the receiver, handguard, and the open muzzle end.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the trigger, magazine, and the ergonomic wooden grip and stock.
description_view_3: Rear-angled view emphasizing the solid wooden stock and the underside of the handguard.
